answer:
Good day, Alice
GOOD DAY, BOB
explanation: g.greet("Alice") calls FormalGreeter.greet() → 'Good day, Alice'. g.greetLoud("Bob") uses the default method from the interface, which calls greet("Bob") — dispatched dynamically to FormalGreeter.greet() — producing 'Good day, Bob', then toUpperCase() → 'GOOD DAY, BOB'.
alternatives:
Good day, Alice
GOOD DAY, BOB
